title: trisetum bifidum var. macranthum
intro: Trisetum bifidum var. macranthum, also known as big-fruited hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Trisetum bifidum var. macranthum include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topically applied as a poultice, making it a useful remedy for various skin conditions.
